{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Wandering Titan's shell replica
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has a black shield that is a replica of the [[Wandering Titan]]’s shell.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
